prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 43267→52345→28929→38996，波动较大；2024 年因新高考改革首年出现大幅前移，2025 年回调至约 38996 名，近两年呈震荡走势；2025 年基准约 38996 名；本省理科（物理类）计划 2022 年 238 人、2023 年 223 人、2024 年 272 人、2025 年 380 人；2026 年计划 377 人，较 2025 年微幅缩减约 0.8%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年约第 144 名持续上升至 2026 年约第 87 名，近年排名提升显著，学校综合实力与认可度明显增强；2023 年声誉偏负面（教师不配合核酸事件），2024 年转为中性/混合（校区争议）；抖音热度排名第 32（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度有所升温；未见明显投档断档记录；该校以农林、法学、旅游管理等为传统特色。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业持续高热推荐 ，与该校开设的计算机、自动化、电子信息等专业高度契合，相关专业报考热度升温；本省 2026 年考生总数约 53.5 万人，按近年物理类占比约 61.5% 估算约 32.9 万人，较 2025 年物理类 28.5 万人增加约 4.4 万人，竞争加剧；海南大学位于海南省，距四川省较远，跨省就读需考虑地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次震荡走势、2026 年计划微幅缩减、软科排名持续大幅上升及本省物理类考生明显增加，在 2025 年基准 38996 名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 38611 名，区间 38111–39111 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 Science (Physics Category) minimum rankings approximately 43267→52345→28929→38996, with significant fluctuations; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, there was a substantial forward shift, and in 2025 it adjusted back to approximately 38996, showing a volatile trend in the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 38996; provincial Science (Physics Category) enrollment plans: 238 in 2022, 223 in 2023, 272 in 2024, 380 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 377, a slight reduction of about 0.8% compared to 2025, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from approximately 144th in 2021 to about 87th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, and the university's comprehensive strength and recognition have notably increased; in 2023, reputation was somewhat negative (teacher non-cooperation with nucleic acid testing incident), turning neutral/mixed in 2024 (campus controversy); Douyin popularity ranking 32nd (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high, with rising application attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; the university is traditionally characterized by agriculture, forestry, law, tourism management, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other popular science majors continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's offerings in Computer Science, Automation, Electronic Information, etc., with rising application heat for related majors; the province's total number of examinees in 2026 is approximately 535,000, with an estimated 329,000 in the Physics Category based on a recent proportion of about 61.5%, an increase of about 44,000 compared to 285,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, far from Sichuan Province, so cross-province enrollment requires consideration of regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the volatile historical rankings, slight reduction in the 2026 plan, continuous significant rise in Soft Science rankings, and a notable increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 38996; predicted minimum ranking approximately 38611, with a range of 38111–39111.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 38111–39111, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 popular majors as a reach and Tier 3 traditional agriculture and engineering majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 38000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science, Software Engineering, and Automation; if your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (e.g., around 39000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors and be cautious with Tier 1.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 5007 → 4788 → 8207 → 6365. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant backward shift, and in 2025 it adjusted back to about 6365. In recent two years, it has shown a fluctuating trend of first decreasing then increasing. The baseline for 2025 is about 6365. The provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 72 in 2022, 89 in 2023, 77 in 2024, and 65 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 59, a reduction of about 9.2% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large reduction and has a certain impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from about 144th in 2021 to about 87th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, and the school's comprehensive strength and recognition have notably increased. In 2023, the reputation was somewhat negative (incident of teachers not cooperating with nucleic acid testing), and in 2024 it turned neutral/mixed (campus controversy). Douyin popularity ranking is 32nd (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention has increased. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. The school has traditional characteristics in agriculture, forestry, law, tourism management, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as law and Chinese language and literature are socially popular/recommended, aligning with the school's offerings in law, Chinese language and literature, etc. The province's total number of examinees in 2026 is about 535,000, with an estimated 206,000 in the history category based on the recent proportion of about 38.5%, an increase of about 28,000 compared to 178,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, far from Sichuan Province, so cross-province study requires consideration of regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the continuous substantial rise in Soft Science rankings, and the increase in provincial history category examinees, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 6365. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5963, with a range of 5463–6463.
